jobs.title: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS)
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bosnia, Bulgaria, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Serbia, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Staff LLM Interaction Engineer (Europe remote - TS/Vue/NodeJS) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. The role As a Staff level LLM Interaction Engineer , you’ll help shape how n8n’s AI Workflow Builder works end-to-end. This staff level engineering role is focused on a critical product challenge: allowing both technical or less-technically proficient users of n8n to turn AI powered automated workflows into something they can rely on every day. That means building systems that consistently generate the right output, stay grounded in the user’s workflow, and improve quickly through iteration and evaluation. You’ll work on the orchestration layer between users, workflows, a

score.reason: Staff-level Vue+TypeScript engineer needed for AI workflow builder, with Spain explicitly accepted. However, the job description cuts off mid-sentence and emphasizes LLM orchestration over UI components, leaving frontend responsibilities unclear.
red_flags: Role emphasizes AI/LLM systems design over UI

As a Senior AI Engineer, you'll drive intelligent features that redefine how users build automations. You'll collaborate across engineering, product, and design to bring generative AI and LLM-based enhancements into the core user experience. You'll improve existing AI integrations, develop new ones, and shape how AI powers our product. You’ll work across the entire AI feature lifecycle: Architect and implement AI-powered capabilities : code gen

score.reason: Though n8n matches location/seniority, this role is backend AI engineering (LLM APIs, prompt engineering, embeddings)—not frontend. Vue is mentioned in the title but the job requires generative AI expertise, which is outside Alfonso's domain.
red_flags: Vue secondary to AI infrastructure work

jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bulgaria, Bosnia, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Romania, Serbia, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Finland, Norway, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Germany, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. 🎯 Your main goal will be to build and ship end-to-end TypeScript product features that customers feel in their workflows the same week - balancing speed, quality, and high security standards. To do so, you’ll own outcomes across the full stack and stay close to users, product, and metrics: End-to-end product ownership Own a product area surface from discovery to delivery, including iteration after launch. Ship high-quality features fast across the TypeScript stack, balancing UX, performance, and maintainability. Partner closely with Product to translate customer problems into clear scopes and

score.reason: While the job matches Alfonso's TypeScript expertise, Vue is diluted as equally acceptable with React, and the role demands deep Node.js expertise for scalable, high-traffic services beyond his basic Node depth. The incomplete job description also raises questions about full scope.

needsReview.title: Senior Fullstack Developer
needsReview.rawDescription: We are looking for new professionals to join Pareto's journey Pareto is a growing software company built around experienced professionals and a sharp focus on what delivers results. We currently have over 50 senior software professionals on our team, and we’re hiring more this year. We’re looking for an experienced fullstack developer who wants to work on challenging client projects across industries. What will you do? You will work on our clients’ product development, typically as a developer, occasionally as an architect or technical lead when the project calls for it. We deliver full projects and integrate into our clients’ teams. Projects span industries like technology, manufacturing, defense, process industry, energy, logistics, food production, healthcare, and the public sector. The common factor: complex systems that require broad technical expertise across the full stack. You’ll have direct influence on client projects, technology choices, and engineering practices. What we expect At least 8 years of experience in software development. You work across the full stack and take ownership of what you build. Interest in AI-assisted development is expected. Experience with tools like Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or similar is an advantage. We work AI-natively and expect our developers to do the same. Strong experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React or Vue, and solid backend skills in Node.js, Python, Java, .NET, or similar. Databases and integrations are familiar territory. Experience with cloud platforms, primarily Azure or AWS. Ability to work with clients. You can communicate technical decisions in business terms and adapt to different organizational contexts. High standards for code quality. Maintainability, testability, and DevOps practices are part of how you work every day. What we offer Salary based on your experience: 4500–6500 EUR/month. Comprehensive benefits: extensive occupational healthcare, leisure-time accident and travel insuran

score.reason: Vue is secondary to React in this fullstack role; Finland-based with no explicit remote policy. Backend-heavy stack with Azure/AWS requirement falls outside Alfonso's specialization.

needsReview.title: Full-Stack Engineer - Tieto Tech Consulting (m/f/d)
needsReview.rawDescription: Company Description Job Description Tule mukaan Tieto Tech Consulting -tiimiin ja kasva osaajana myös roolisi ulkopuolella! Meillä pääset työskentelemään monipuolisissa ja yhteiskunnallisesti merkityksellisissä projekteissa, joissa jokaisen näkökulmalla ja osaamisella on arvoa. Tässä tehtävässä pääset vaikuttamaan tulevaisuudendigitaalista arkeaosana asiantuntevaa, kannustavaa ja monimuotoista yhteisöä, jossa oppimista ja yhdessä onnistumista tuetaan. Mikä on Tech Consulting? Tech Consulting on digitaalisen suunnittelun ja ohjelmistokehityksen yksikkö, jossa autamme asiakkaitamme kasvamaan yhdistämällä liiketoimintamuotoilun, teknologisen osaamisen ja modernin ohjelmistokehityksen. Uskomme yhteistyöhön, avoimuuteen ja siihen, että parhaat ratkaisut syntyvät erilaisten ihmisten ja ajatusten kohdatessa. Asiakkainamme on yli 130 organisaatiota eri toimialoilta - kuten julkishallinto, finanssi, eläke, energia, logistiikka ja valmistava teollisuus. Kehitämme arjen digitaalisia palveluita, joita todennäköisesti käytät itsekin - ja joilla on todellista vaikutusta ihmisten arkeen ja yhteiskuntaan. Mitä tulet tekemään? Etsimme nyt kehittäjää, jolla on vähintään 3 kolme vuotta työkokemusta seuraavista asioista:Angular, Node.js ja TypeScript Java ja Spring Boot AWS Kokemus tekoälyavusteisesta ohjelmistokehityksestä Kokemus ketteristä toimintatavoista Kokemusta finanssialalta Mitä odotamme sinulta?Sujuvaa suomen ja englannin kielen taitoa Lisäksi uskomme, että viihdyt ja menestyt tehtävässä erityisen hyvin, jos sinulla on myös:Kokemusta JS-frameworkeista, kuten Next.js, Gatsby, Remix, React, Svelte tai Vue Saavutettavuusvaatimusten tuntemusta ja kokemusta aiheeseen liittyvistä projekteista DevOps-käytäntöjen tuntemusta Kokemusta testiautomaatiotyökaluista Miksi liittyä kasvavaan tiimiimme? Tieto Tech Consultingilla työskentelet teknologian, innovaation ja yhteiskunnallisen vaikuttavuuden rajapinnassa. Saat tueksesi Suomen laajimman IT-osaajaverkoston sekä kulttuurin, joka kannu

score.reason: Poor fit. Role is backend-heavy (Angular, Java/Spring, AWS) with TypeScript as only match. Critical blocker: job requires fluent Finnish; Alfonso speaks English (B2) and Spanish only.
red_flags: Requires fluent Finnish (not in Alfonso's languages)
Backend-heavy (Java, Spring Boot, AWS expertise required)
